llmRubric: The agent's final text must include at least one recognizable multi-word phrase from Herman Melville's Moby Dick excerpt rendered on httpbin.org/html. Any authentic phrase is acceptable — e.g. 'Availing himself', 'mild, clear blue', 'North-Indian summer', 'summer-cool weather', 'Moby-Dick', 'the Pequod', 'Ahab', 'whale', etc. Do NOT require a specific opening-words match. Pass as long as the agent clearly quoted something real from the rendered page.
